args.text: CVE-2026-30117 severity assessment confirmed: session-fixation vulnerability in auth-api and session-store classified as high severity. Remediation initiated.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body:
Patch window for CVE-2026-30117 remediation has been confirmed.

Affected services and versions:
- auth-api: v5.8.1 → v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.6 → v2.2.9

Deployment will proceed in order. Post-patch credential rotation and session re-establishment required.

Ticket: TCK-9902

args.text: CVE-2026-30117 patch deployment completed and verified. Both affected services now running patched versions: auth-api v5.8.4, session-store v2.2.9.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 patching has been completed and verified.

Deployed and confirmed:
- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

All affected services are now running patched versions. Proceeding with credential rotation and staff session re-establishment.

Ticket: TCK-9902

args.text: Credential rotation completed per rotation-checklist.md: (1) all active refresh tokens invalidated, (2) signing keys rotated, (3) old keys confirmed rejected. All staff sessions must be re-established.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
A critical security update (CVE-2026-30117) has been applied to our authentication system.

All staff sessions have been invalidated as part of this remediation. Please sign in again to establish a new secure session.

No action is required from you at this time — you will be redirected to sign in on your next request.

Ticket: TCK-9902
